candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; appears as the first revenue row and matches total sales/revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue label, likely an alternate/duplicate reporting label for some years.
Expense line, not revenue.
COGS-type expense line, not revenue.
Non-operating finance income, not revenue from sales.
Interest income, not operating revenue.
Interest income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Bottom-line income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income/(loss) for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; do not sum them.

candidates.why: Canonical direct-cost line for cost of goods sold/cost of sales.
Also a direct-cost/production-cost line and may be the company-specific COGS label in some years.

variables.notes: Selected the most semantically exact COGS label and kept final_choice minimal to avoid double counting with the mining-specific alternate label.

candidates.why: Personnel/overhead expense; strong SG&A component.
Share-based compensation is an overhead component and explicitly allowed.
Overhead bucket above operating profit; appropriate SG&A component when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Residual operating overhead component above operating profit.
Dedicated R&D expense above operating profit; include in XSGA as well when separate so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Same concept as Share-Based Payment, but duplicate/alternate casing; avoid selecting both.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: OK. CR:c|high|double. No explicit SG&A subtotal is present, so selected overhead component rows above operating profit. Included the separate R&D line in XSGA_COMPONENTS as required so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; best match.
Tax credit, not R&D expense itself.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense line identified above operating profit.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest component; valid interest expense.
Too broad/net; likely includes FX and other non-interest items, so not preferred when components exist.
Direct recurring interest expense component.
Capitalized interest offsets expense and should not be treated as interest expense here.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Direct interest expense component on financing.
Residual/net finance bucket likely includes non-interest items; avoid when granular interest rows exist.
Residual finance bucket likely mixed; avoid when granular rows exist.
Other/net finance item, not clearly recurring interest.
Not interest expense.
Not interest expense.
Generic valid interest label, but likely overlaps with more granular rows if populated.

candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest row; avoid duplicate counting.
Balance sheet accrual, not P&L expense row.
Liability balance, not P&L expense row.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Ambiguous balance sheet supplemental line, not preferred over income statement expense rows.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest-expense components and excluded broad/net finance rows and supplemental duplicates to avoid including FX/fair-value items or double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not a balance sheet equity stock measure.

candidates.why: OCI flow item, not book equity.
Best owner/parent equity line; excludes non-controlling interests and matches book equity concept.
Valid only as fallback if no parent/owner equity line exists; not needed here.
Share count, not equity value.

variables.notes: Preferred parent/ordinary-shareholder equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

Income statement attribution line; less preferred than balance sheet NCI for MIB.
